fixes.description: Rewrote _extract_pair_from_doc to use the actual basqueGLUE bec schema (text + label, 3-class sentiment) instead of the generic question/choices probe that returned None for every doc.
fixes.reasoning: The lm-eval bec.yaml uses doc_to_text='Testua: {{text}}\n...' and doc_to_choice=['negatiboa','neutrala','positiboa']. Original extractor checked for 'question' and 'choices' fields which don't exist in this dataset, so every doc was skipped → zero pairs → FAIL. New implementation reads text+label and constructs the prompt + 3-class label list directly.
fixes.after: extraction=PASS (5 pairs), evaluator=SKIP_NO_MODEL (log-likelihoods evaluator needs a real model; skip is not a failure)

fixes.description: Added COPA-es format handler (premise + question(cause/effect) + choice1 + choice2 + label).
fixes.reasoning: spanish_bench_mc.py only handled OpenBookQA-style docs (question + choices{label,text} + answerKey). copa_es uses premise + choice1 + choice2 + label so every doc was skipped → zero pairs.

fixes.description: Added NLI binary paraphrase format handler (sentence1 + sentence2 + label).
fixes.reasoning: Same root cause as copa_es — paws_es uses sentence1+sentence2+label which the OpenBookQA-only extractor skipped.

fixes.description: Same NLI binary handler covers wnli_es (sentence1 + sentence2 + label).
fixes.reasoning: Same root cause as paws_es.

fixes.description: Added XNLI 3-class format handler (premise + hypothesis + label).
fixes.reasoning: xnli_es uses premise+hypothesis+label (entailment/neutral/contradiction) which the OpenBookQA-only extractor skipped.

fixes.description: Added paws_ca paraphrase format handler (sentence1 + sentence2 + label).
fixes.reasoning: catalan_bench_mc.py handled COPA-ca and cocoteros + OpenBookQA-style; paws_ca uses sentence1+sentence2+label and was being skipped.

fixes.description: Added catcola grammaticality format handler (Sentence + Label, capitalized fields).
fixes.reasoning: catcola uses 'Sentence' and 'Label' (capitalized) — distinct from sentence1/2 in paws_ca.

fixes.description: Added extractive QA format handler (context + question + answers{text:[...]}).
fixes.reasoning: catalanqa uses SQuAD-style context+question+answers structure. Synthetic incorrect = reversed words of correct answer.

fixes.description: Added topic_based_nli format handler (text + topic + polarity in {positif, negatif, neutre}).
fixes.reasoning: french_bench_mc only handled boolqa + Standard MC + Hellaswag styles. topic_based_nli doc structure is text+topic+polarity.

fixes.description: Added reading_comp format handler (context + question + answerA/B/C/D + answer).
fixes.reasoning: Doc uses 4 answer fields (answerA-D) and an 'answer' letter pointer; not the answerKey/A-D format the existing handler expected.

fixes.description: Added trivia generation format handler (Question + Answer, capitalized fields).
fixes.reasoning: Trivia is generate_until task; doc has 'Question' and 'Answer' (capitalized). Synthetic incorrect = reversed words.

fixes.description: Added multifquad extractive QA format handler (context + question + answers{text:[...]}).
fixes.reasoning: Same SQuAD-style structure as catalanqa.

fixes.description: Added explicit blimp_complex_np_island → blimp_complex_NP_island case fix and _NP_ to is_case_sensitive checks so it survives lowercase normalization.
fixes.reasoning: lm-eval task name uses uppercase NP (Noun Phrase). The cache lowercases it. Without case preservation the lookup misses.

fixes.description: Added _principle_A to is_case_sensitive checks so the existing blimp_principle_a → blimp_principle_A transformation survives lowercase normalization.
fixes.reasoning: Same root cause as blimp_complex_np_island — the transformation produced the right name but the lowercase normalization right after wiped it out.

fixes.description: Added _prompt_<N> → _prompt-<N> regex inside the evalita_mp/sp dash transformation block.
fixes.reasoning: lm-eval evalita yamls use 'task: evalita-mp_at_prompt-1' (dash before the number). The HF cache stores them with all underscores. ~80 evalita entries depend on this.

fixes.description: Added _fp_small_/_fc_small_ → _fp-small_/_fc-small_ regex in the evalita transformation block.
fixes.reasoning: evalita summarization yamls use 'fp-small' (with dash before 'small') in their task names; cache uses underscores.

fixes.description: Added flores_<2letter>_<2letter> → <bench>_flores_<src>-<tgt> transformation, picking the bench prefix (catalan_bench/portuguese_bench/basque_bench/galician_bench/spanish_bench) from the source-language code (or target if source is unmapped).
fixes.reasoning: The 2-letter flores entries (~55 in failing list) live under <bench>/flores_<lang>/ with task names like 'catalan_bench_flores_ca-de'. The cache stores them as 'flores_ca_de'. This transformation reconstructs the full path.
fixes.after: extraction=PASS (5 pairs), evaluator=PASS (full pass — generation evaluator works without external model)

fixes.description: Added eq_bench schema handler (prompt + reference_answer_fullscale). Uses reference_answer_fullscale as positive, word-reversed as synthetic negative.
fixes.reasoning: After mapping eq → eq_bench in TASK_NAME_MAPPING, the extractor still returned 0 pairs because eq_bench docs have a generation-style structure (prompt + reference_answer_fullscale, no choices), not the multiple-choice fields the extractor was probing for.

fixes.description: Added gsm8k_platinum manifest entry pointing to MATH500Extractor (was missing despite gsm8k_platinum_cot variants being registered).
Added code2text_javascript and code2text_{go,java,php,ruby} manifest entries pointing to existing Code2Text language-specific HF extractors.
Added ds_1000 entry mirroring ds1000 so the underscore-normalized cache name routes to docker_execution.
fixes.before: FAIL (DockerSandboxExecutor crash on init when called for non-docker evaluator)

fixes.description: Added ja_leaderboard_xwinograd schema handler (sentence + sentence1 + sentence2 + answer 1/2). Cache name 'ja' is mapped to 'ja_leaderboard_xwinograd' in TASK_NAME_MAPPING; the existing JaExtractor only handled generic question/choices probes which didn't match xwinograd.
Added dbpedia → dbpedia_14 TASK_NAME_MAPPING entry.
fixes.reasoning: The cache name 'dbpedia' has no corresponding lm-eval yaml; the actual task is dbpedia_14 in the unitxt suite.

fixes.description: Added inverse_scaling format handler (prompt + classes + answer_index) at the top of _extract_pair_from_doc.
fixes.reasoning: After mapping inverse to inverse_scaling_modus_tollens, the InverseExtractor still returned 0 pairs because it probed for question/choices/answer fields. inverse_scaling docs use prompt+classes+answer_index.

fixes.description: Same fix as 'inverse' — the inverse_scaling cache name maps to the same lm-eval task.
Same fix as 'inverse' — uses the same prompt+classes+answer_index schema.
Added ethics → ethics_cm TASK_NAME_MAPPING entry.
fixes.before: FAIL (TaskNotFound — no 'ethics' yaml in lm-eval, only ethics_cm under hendrycks_ethics/)

fixes.description: Added ethos → ethos_binary TASK_NAME_MAPPING entry.
fixes.before: FAIL (TaskNotFound — actual task is ethos_binary in unitxt suite)

fixes.description: Added gsm → gsm8k TASK_NAME_MAPPING entry.
fixes.before: FAIL (TaskNotFound — no bare 'gsm' task, only gsm8k variants)

fixes.description: Updated Format 3 (query/prompt + answer) to read reference_answer_fullscale field used by eq_bench multilingual variants. Synthetic negative is reversed words instead of placeholder string.
Same reference_answer_fullscale Format 3 update as eq_bench_ca.

Added global_piqa schema handler (prompt + solution0 + solution1 + label) to GlobalPiqaExtractor. Also exempted global_piqa_* task names from _restore_script_case in lm_loader.py because the lm-eval yamls use lowercase script codes (global_piqa_completions_eng_latn) — the title-case restore was producing 'eng_Latn' which doesn't match.
fixes.before: FAIL (zero pairs, then KeyError on case-restored name)

fixes.description: Added bigbench → bigbench_anachronisms_multiple_choice TASK_NAME_MAPPING entry.
fixes.reasoning: There is no top-level bigbench yaml in lm-eval; it's a directory of leaf tasks. Mapping the bare cache name to a representative leaf so the entry resolves.

fixes.description: Added bbh → bbh_cot_zeroshot_word_sorting TASK_NAME_MAPPING entry.
fixes.reasoning: There is no top-level bbh yaml; it's a directory tree of cot_zeroshot/cot_fewshot/fewshot/zeroshot leaf tasks.

fixes.description: Added arithmetic → arithmetic_2da TASK_NAME_MAPPING entry.
fixes.reasoning: There is no aggregator arithmetic.yaml; only arithmetic_<N>d{a,m,c,s}.yaml leaves exist.

fixes.description: Added 'chain' to HF manifest pointing to MATH500Extractor (HF path). Removed earlier TASK_NAME_MAPPING entry that pointed to a non-existent chain_of_thought lm-eval task.
fixes.before: FAIL (extractor lookup wrong path; lm-eval load failed)

fixes.description: Added cnn_dailymail schema handler (article + highlights) to CnnExtractor. Synthetic negative is reversed sentences in the highlights.
fixes.reasoning: After mapping cnn → cnn_dailymail_abisee, the existing extractor only handled the unitxt source/target schema and the generic MC probes. The actual cnn_dailymail uses article+highlights.

fixes.description: Added ethics_cm schema handler (input + label, binary 0/1 mapping to ['no','yes']).
fixes.reasoning: After mapping commonsense → ethics_cm, the existing extractor returned 0 pairs because it probed for question+choices fields. ethics_cm uses input+label.

fixes.description: Mapped gpt3 → wmt14-fr-en (the only translation task the Gpt3Extractor knows about). This is the kind of redirect the user flagged for review.
fixes.reasoning: There is no 'gpt3' lm-eval task. The Gpt3Extractor's task_names lists 'gpt3_translation_benchmarks' which is also not a real lm-eval task; the only valid path is one of the wmt14 leaves.
fixes.after: UNVERIFIED — wmt14-fr-en loads multi-million sentence pairs and the extractor blocks for >5min on dataset download. Verification was killed. Recommend deleting this cache entry instead of keeping the redirect.
fixes.note: USER REVIEW NEEDED: redirect targets a slow-loading translation dataset; cache entry may be invalid and should be removed instead.

fixes.description: Replaced broken self._build_pair() call with direct ContrastivePair construction (the original called a method that didn't exist on the class until I added it to the LMEvalBenchmarkExtractor parent — but bhtc_v2 subclasses HuggingFaceBenchmarkExtractor so the parent method was actually available; the explicit construction is equivalent and safer).
fixes.reasoning: The bhtc_v2 extractor returned 0 pairs in cache failures. I rewrote the build call to use PositiveResponse/NegativeResponse + ContrastivePair directly with the correct topic/category labels.
